title: Misatos apartment
wikitext:
[]: Misato's apartment             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:07 am What is up with Shinji not taking advantage of living with Misato and Asuka? Unlike Shinji, i would feel a lot more comfortable living with such a lively person and most certainly get my share of beer with my roomies and penpen. Also, i would use the apartment building's/nerve's workout gym to get strong, show my six pack to Asuka and say, "how are you going to say no to this, eh?" If you were/are 14 years old, what would YOU(not Shinji) do if you were set in this position?

[]: Re: Misato's apartment             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:11 am konfunoodle wrote: What is up with Shinji not taking advantage of living with Misato and Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:13 am I'd drool after Rei, since she's the first girl I saw in Tokyo-3 and everyone knows it's the first girl who wins.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:27 am I like the "twist" with Asuka and Misato trying to seduce him but Shinji not really responding for various reasons (well, only reacting to Asuka when she's asleep). If you were/are 14 years old, what would you do if you were set in this position?

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:39 am Umm... I'd do what Shinji did, but with less apologizing and more standing up for myself. Asuka isn't really very open to my particular brand of seduction. Which is a lot less like actual "seduction" than just trying to be there for people I care about. She'd be like " Rawr, I don't need your stupid help, baka! " And as for Misato, I don't know that I'd want to hook up with a chick more than ten years older than me. Especially if I'm fourteen. No, probably, I'd make friends with Rei, hang out with mah stooges more, and maybe try to get a non-Nerv-related girlfriend. And tell Gendo to GTFO . See, most of this actually does not have to do with Shinji's living quarters. So, I guess I just wasted your time with an irrelevant post... sorry, guys.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:44 am i'd also through parties and tell Misato that its to boost my confidence to get along with people or not tell her at all since she works a lot

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:52 am I think Misato would notice. She might act like a ditz, but she's actually very intelligent. Not to mention that there's not enough room at her place anyways. Seriously, there's a map of her apartment, it's tiny. Not good for parties at all.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:54 am From the IRC: <NAveryW> What is up with Shinji not taking advantage of living with Misato and Asuka? <Fazmotron> maybe he has weird pubic hair

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sun Nov 29, 2009 1:46 am NAveryW wrote: From the IRC: <NAveryW> What is up with Shinji not taking advantage of living with Misato and Asuka? <Fazmotron> maybe he has weird pubic hair

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sun Nov 29, 2009 1:52 am @Uriel: I'd have to agree, and I will give this example - I am 5'8". Misato is (purportedly) 5'4", and Shinji is 4'11", which means that either I'm really fucking tall, or Shinji (and by extension, Misato and a good bit of the NGE cast in its entirety) is really short, and I'm not tall by a long shot. In all honesty, it'd be a better idea to look at it in perspective - that is, compared to his peers and coworkers, Shinji isn't abnormally short or tall, and the same can be said about the peers and coworkers in question.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Nov 29, 2009 1:59 am If you were/are 14 years old, what would YOU(not Shinji) do if you were set in this position?

[]: Re: Misato's apartment             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:41 am konfunoodle wrote: If you were/are 14 years old, what would YOU(not Shinji) do if you were set in this position?

[]: Re: Misato's apartment             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:47 am konfunoodle wrote: If you were/are 14 years old, what would YOU(not Shinji) do if you were set in this position?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Nov 29, 2009 3:00 am Lets see, if I were 14 years old and living with two people like Misato Katsuragi and Asuka Langely Soryu... I'd be a bit passive-agressive with Asuka, but also playful and flirtatious, because that's just me. And if certain cards fell into place, I might make something of it. With Misato, I'd enjoy her company, but that'd be it. We'd be just friends, but we'd be damn good friends. That kind of friendship you rarely see anymore. She'd be Kamina to my Simon; the Edward to my Alphonse; The Pegg to my Frost. Sure, it wouldn't be the most ideal life, but it'd be what I'd make of it, and it'd be home.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Nov 29, 2009 4:39 am Okay, to seriously answer... I'd die really quickly in an Eva battle. Or I'd snap and lose it a lot quicker than Shinji. And, to be honest, I suspect this is what would happen to most of us.

[]: Re: Misato's apartment             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sun Nov 29, 2009 4:39 am Vegeta 20XX wrote: konfunoodle wrote: If you were/are 14 years old, what would YOU(not Shinji) do if you were set in this position?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 29, 2009 5:03 am Every harem lead is expected to go through life oblivious to all the girls craving his body. For me, 14 is long enough ago to be entirely hazy, combined with being in the middle of a period where I had no exposure to girls my own age, so I'm all out of data points. But I expect I would not have even attempted the kiss in ep 9.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sun Nov 29, 2009 6:22 am I'd invite Misato into my room for some training. I'd take my entry plug, put a plug suit on and put it in Misato's Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Nov 29, 2009 7:11 pm Every harem lead is expected to go through life oblivious to all the girls craving his body.

[]: Re: Misato's apartment             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sun Nov 29, 2009 8:10 pm konfunoodle wrote: If you were/are 14 years old, what would YOU(not Shinji) do if you were set in this position?
